pageProps.content:
To celebrate Maintainer Month, we’re spotlighting the people who power open source — and giving back. We’ve teamed up with partners across the ecosystem to offer perks, tools, and resources for maintainers.

Check back throughout May as we add even more!

How It Works

All offers below are available to any open source maintainer—just follow the links to claim your perk.

Some partners are offering premium perks exclusively for our private Maintainer Community. Learn more & request access.

frontmatter.title: Maintainer Month 2026 Partner Pack
frontmatter.subtitle: Real support for the people behind open source
frontmatter.metaTitle: Maintainer Month 2026 Partner Pack | Resources for Open Source Maintainers
frontmatter.metaDesc: Exclusive perks, tools, and resources for open source maintainers during Maintainer Month 2026.

partnerOffers.name: Arachne Digital
partnerOffers.headline: Get project-specific threat insights.
partnerOffers.description: Get a free tailored threat report with likely attacks, key threats, and steps to defend your project.
partnerOffers.secondaryCta: Email contact@arachne.digital with your industry, region, and 'Maintainer Month'

partnerOffers.name: Daytona
partnerOffers.headline: $100 in compute credits for maintainers.
partnerOffers.description: Get $100 in Daytona compute credits to power your open source development environments.

partnerOffers.name: Mockoon
partnerOffers.headline: Build, test, and mock APIs faster.
partnerOffers.description: Get a free Mockoon Cloud account for your open-source project — ideal for maintainers needing reliable API mocks and collaboration.

partnerOffers.name: Open Source Initiative
partnerOffers.headline: The maintaine.rs book, free for all maintainers.
partnerOffers.description: Get the maintaine.rs book from the Open Source Initiative — a guide to sustaining open source projects, free for all maintainers during Maintainer Month.

partnerOffers.name: OpenJS Foundation
partnerOffers.headline: 15% off RenderATL tickets.
partnerOffers.description: Get 15% off RenderATL tickets, courtesy of the OpenJS Foundation.

partnerOffers.name: Radix / .Tech
partnerOffers.headline: Free 1-year .tech domain for maintainers.
partnerOffers.description: Claim a free 1-year .tech domain to give your open source project a home on the web.

partnerOffers.name: Ref.tools
partnerOffers.headline: 2 months free for open source maintainers.
partnerOffers.description: Get 2 months of free access to Ref.tools Basic or Pro — the planning layer for human and agent software teams.

partnerOffers.name: Render
partnerOffers.headline: Cloud credits for open source maintainers.
partnerOffers.description: Render is offering cloud credits for open source maintainers. Details available in the private Maintainer Community.
partnerOffers.secondaryCta: (Available to members of the private Maintainer Community)

partnerOffers.name: Sentry
partnerOffers.headline: Monitor and improve your open source software.
partnerOffers.description: Apply for Sentry's open source plan to track errors, performance, and reliability — built by and for the open source community.

partnerOffers.name: Web Summit
partnerOffers.headline: Connect with global tech leaders.
partnerOffers.description: Get discounted tickets to Web Summit Vancouver and Lisbon through their Developer Program — plus access to workshops and community events for open source contributors.

additionalSections.wantMoreContent: Request to join the Maintainer Community to unlock additional perks and early access.
additionalSections.partnersContent: A big thank you to every partner supporting the people who make open source possible.
additionalSections.joinAsPartnerContent: Interested in joining as a partner? Email us—we're accepting new offers throughout May!
